Template Use Case/Title: green location NA Specific Changing FedEx Ship Speed
Applicable SOPs: Change Ship Method or Carrier on PO Due to Item Count / Size (Supplier Entered) SOP (DSC2S) - VCN Changing A Ship Speed
Text: Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding this order assigned to FedEx Express and sharing that you are unable to use this ship service. I understand the confusion this may have caused. I was able to resolve this today. I have updated this PO to now ship with FedEx Ground. Please reregister this PO to generate a new label with the right information. Please note that customers pay extra for Express shipping and by downgrading this PO to Ground, the order will most likely be delivered later than the date the customer paid to receive it. We ask that you reach out to your local FedEx representative to resolve any issues with Express shipping so that the assigned ship speed can be used for future orders. If you have limitations that will prevent you from shipping future orders with FedEx at faster ship speeds, please respond to this ticket with a list of your warehouses which cannot ship with Express and our team is happy to add the correct restrictions preventing you from receiving Express-assigned orders going forward. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Kind regards, YOUR_NAME

We would like to make you aware of a more permanent solution to help reduce manual work on future shipping method change requests. For future instances, please note that carrier selection depends on item dimensions. Please ensure the item dimensions are correct in Partner Home. You may alternatively enter a Shipping Dimensions Update ticket to request a shipping dimension update. You will be asked for specific item-level information including part number and manufacturer part number. Instructions on how to do so can be found here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/3377 . Alternatively, if this request is driven by the quantity of items on the order, you can use SKU Quantity Threshold automation to handle this automatically. This feature allows an order to automatically switch from SP to LTL once it reaches a pre-set quantity at the SKU level. By using this, you can eliminate the need to submit manual "Change Ship Method" tickets, ensure more accurate delivery promises for customers, and support stronger fulfillment performance. To request a quantity threshold be set for your SKUs, please provide the list of SKUs and their last successful SP shipping quantity to your Strategic Relationship Manager who’s contact details can be located on the "contact us" page on Wayfair Partner Home, [ https://partners.wayfair.com/v/supplier/contact/wayfair_contact/index ] Note: The required threshold is the last quantity that can successfully ship as SP (e.g., if 5 units must ship LTL, the threshold is 4). We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so please enter a new ticket for any new PO issues so we can ensure it is appropriately addressed. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Kind regards, YOUR_NAME

Template Use Case/Title: green location NA Specific OMAX Terms Agreement - LP to SP
Applicable SOPs: Change Ship Method or Carrier on PO Due to Item Count / Size (Supplier Entered) SOP (DSC2S) - VCN Large Parcel to Small Parcel
Text: Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding the ship method for this PO. This item has been flagged by FedEx as being oversized. I’m happy to review more about this process with you today so you know the options we can proceed with on this shipment. By requesting to downgrade the shipping method from Large Parcel to Small Parcel, you acknowledge and accept full responsibility for any additional charges incurred if the product exceeds FedEx’s small parcel shipping guidelines. FedEx may assess an Oversize Maximum (OMX) surcharge of up to $900 per shipment if the package exceeds dimensional limits, including cases where packaging expands during transit. Please note that Wayfair does not have a process to dispute FedEx’s OMX charges once assessed - we accept FedEx’s determination as final. For more information, please refer to FedEx’s General Packaging Guidelines . If you agree to these terms and would like to change the shipping method on this order from Large Parcel to Small Parcel, please respond in this thread to confirm, and we will proceed with making this update for you. Please note that if you do not confirm this change, this PO will remain set as a Large Parcel ship method. If you have additional questions or concerns about this process, please feel free to send those in an update here as well and I am happy to help address those for you. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Best, YOUR_NAME

Template Use Case/Title: green location NA Specific Consolidated Delivery LP to SP Clarification
Applicable SOPs: Change Ship Method or Carrier on PO Due to Item Count / Size (Supplier Entered) SOP (DSC2S) - VCN Large Parcel to Small Parcel Consolidated Delivery
Text: Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding the ship method for this PO. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause you. I can review this process with you today. To clarify, the shipping method for this item is small parcel, but it is part of a consolidated delivery. With consolidated deliveries, our mutual customers order multiple items from different suppliers and then has them all delivered at the same time for their convenience. The final delivery point for this order will be completed by the Wayfair Delivery Network. In this case, your team will still ship this order as normal via FedEx. Instead of shipping directly to the customer, it will be shipped to a Wayfair facility where the shipments will then be consolidated and delivered to the customer. Your team is free to proceed with shipping this PO as normal. Should you see this type of order in future, please proceed with generating the shippings documents to receive FedEx labels and ship as you normally would. Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Kind regards, YOUR_NAME
